message:
So, the other day, I was in the kitchen trying to whip up a fancy dinner (you know, the one I saw online that looked super easy). I got so caught up in chopping onions that I nearly forgot the pan on the stove! Suddenly, the smoke alarm blared like it was auditioning for a rock band. My heart raced, and I fumbled for the dish towel while trying to wave the smoke away. 

In that moment, I realized I had no escape plan if things really went south—just a smoke-filled kitchen and a very annoyed cat! 

It was a funny wake-up call about how unprepared I was, despite thinking I had it all figured out. A quick peek at some home fire safety tips afterward really helped me see the importance of having a plan in place. 

Have you ever had a kitchen mishap that made you rethink your safety prep?
